description: PHP script where the vulnerable readLine() call exists only in a test file (tests/test_stream.php) with no entry point from index.php. CVE-2022-24775 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: readLine() is called in tests/test_stream.php but that file is not required from index.php. Production code never reaches the vulnerable function.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable readLine() call exists only in test_stream.php which is not reachable from index.php. Production code never invokes the vulnerable function.
